exp17_beam.note: beam recovery ~81% vs greedy ~77%, stable, far from 100% -> A/B gap not a greedy artifact

exp18_cross_transcriber.note: A/B gap holds on 2 independent transcribers (68-82%) -> not a transcription artifact

exp19_label_ngram.note: richer templates separate star/plant (TV 0.25-0.33 vs initial-glyph 0.154) and within-dialect (p=0.0005), but pattern is the e-vs-o register axis, not evident naming
